name: Alchemy Pay
description: Fiat-crypto payment gateway API bridging Web2 merchants and crypto/stablecoins globally.

seo.title: Alchemy Pay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Alchemy Pay: Fiat-crypto payment gateway API bridging Web2 merchants and crypto/stablecoins globally.

when_to_use: Accepting crypto and stablecoins alongside fiat at Web3 checkout
Bridging Web2 e-commerce to crypto payment rails via API
On-ramping users from local fiat currencies to crypto globally
Adding USDT/USDC payment acceptance to gaming or NFT platforms

cons: Fees higher than pure crypto rails
review.verdict: Practical fiat-crypto bridge for merchants wanting stablecoin settlement without running wallets themselves.
review.best_for: Web3 apps and exchanges needing compliant global fiat on-ramps
review.not_for: Merchants wanting traditional card processing without crypto exposure

lock_in.reason: Standardized fiat-crypto APIs; switching gateways possible

developer_experience.reason: REST APIs, docs for crypto on/off-ramp
